title: Randomz
description: Randomize every texture in the game cuz y not???
body:
# RANDOMZ

### If your gonna showcase/distrubute any of my packs anywhere e.g youtube, discord then you must use the modrinth link

Randomz is a chaotic texture pack that completely swaps every texture in Minecraft, ensuring nothing looks the way you expect. Blocks and items are all shuffled around, making even the simplest tasks unpredictable. Designed especially for YouTuber challenges like “beating Minecraft with random textures,” Randomz adds confusion, laughter, and difficulty to your gameplay. If you want a fresh twist on survival or to challenge your friends with pure randomness, this pack is for you.

## [Check out my other packs here!](https://modrinth.com/user/JJ_00_EPICS)
